workflows.name: reply_to_inbound_email
workflows.goal: Read inbound mail, gather context, draft a reply, and send only when delivery is explicitly intended.
retryRules: reuse the same idempotencyKey for repeated send attempts

workflows.name: operator_manual_send
workflows.goal: Allow an operator or operator-guided agent to compose and send through the normal draft and queue path.
stopConditions: message belongs in a product workflow rather than an operator path
retryRules: reuse the same idempotencyKey for the same logical send
use a new idempotencyKey when message content materially changes

workflows.name: replay_and_recover_message
workflows.goal: Replay normalization or execution, then re-read state before deciding whether a follow-up action is safe.
stopConditions: requested replay mode does not match the recovery goal
outbound delivery would happen without clear approval
retryRules: reuse the same idempotencyKey for the same logical replay
do not reuse a replay key for a different mode or target message
treat any send after replay as a separate explicit action
